title: IVR Cancellation Notice
description: IVR v1 cancellation notice contract for notifying customers only after Core Order State Machine policy accepts cancellation/hold result.
$comment: Sources: PACK-09 and TECH-09. IVR technical exception must not send cancellation notice, and SIM gateway/raw IVR result must not directly notify cancellation. TODO: source documents do not lock notification channel payload schema.

ivr_call_result_id.description: IVR result that contributed input signal.

notice_trigger.description: Trigger for notice. TODO: define official trigger enum.

allowed_after_core_cancelled.description: Whether Core Order State Machine accepted cancellation before notice.

not_sent_for_technical_exception.description: Invariant: no cancellation notice for technical exception.

not_sent_by_sim_gateway.description: Invariant: SIM gateway/raw IVR does not send cancellation notice directly.

privacy_safe.description: Whether notice content is privacy-safe for selected channel.

status.description: Notice status. TODO: define notification notice status enum.
